questions.question: Where did Paul plan to go after visiting Rome?
Paul says it was his ambition to preach the gospel where?
options: Where Christ was not yet named
questions.answer: Where Christ was not yet named

questions.question: Paul says the strong should bear with the failings of the weak and not just please themselves.
Now the God of hope fill you with all joy and _____ in believing.
Whatever things were written before were written for our _____, that through patience and through encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope.
